meta.home_title: Apollon Construction — Facade, Roofing & Renovation in Brussels
meta.home_desc: Facade, roofing and renovation company in Brussels. Trusted subcontractor for architects and real estate agents. Quote within 48h. VAT BE1025.392.245
meta.facade_desc: Everything about facade, roofing and insulation in Brussels. Materials, techniques, energy standards. Free quote within 48h.
meta.primes_desc: Complete guide to renovation grants in Belgium. Wallonia: Prime Habitation. Brussels: RENOLUTION suspended. Flanders: MijnVerbouwPremie.
meta.contact_desc: Contact Apollon Construction for your free quote. Facade, roofing, renovation in Brussels. Response within 24h.

hero.desc: A passionate team, deadlines met, impeccable results. Apollon Construction supports homeowners, architects and developers.

services.intro: From the facade to interior finishing, one single contact. Homeowners, architects, real estate agents — we adapt our approach.
services.facade_desc: Cleaning, external thermal insulation (EWI), rendering, facade paint, cladding. Works on all types of surfaces.
services.roof_desc: Full renovation, insulation, zinc work, tile repair, waterproofing membranes. Fast on-site diagnosis and quote.
services.reno_desc: Partition walls, BA13 ceilings, coatings, painting, joinery. Complete renovation of apartments, houses and offices.
services.elec_desc: New installation, compliance upgrades, electrical panels, home automation, LED lighting. RGIE compliance report included.
services.finish_desc: Careful finishing to add value to every property.
services.coord_desc: One contact person to manage the entire project. Reporting, planning, budget control.

pages_nav.facade_desc: Everything about facade, roofing and insulation — materials, techniques, energy standards.
pages_nav.primes_desc: Complete guide to renovation grants in Belgium: Brussels, Wallonia and Flanders.

why.lead: Apollon Construction is a team of passionate craftsmen who treat every project as if it were their own.
why.r1_desc: Quote within 48h, rapid mobilisation, single point of contact throughout the project
why.r2_desc: Professional liability, decennial insurance, full compliance with Belgian legislation
why.r3_desc: Regular site photos, progress report, zero unpleasant surprises
why.r4_desc: Detailed schedule provided before start, contractual commitment to deadlines

b2b.lead: Apollon Construction is the on-site partner for real estate and construction professionals.
b2b.arch_desc: Meticulous adherence to plans, regular reports, adaptation to changes during construction.
b2b.eng_desc: Mastery of technical constraints, reading study plans, compliance with office specifications.
b2b.agent_desc: Quick renovation before sale or rental, multi-unit management, partner rates on volume.

contact.desc: Whether it's for a quote, ongoing collaboration or a technical question, our team responds within 24 hours.
contact.ph_message: Describe your project: property type, surface area, location, timeline...
